sentences.text: If Hans saw our fire, food, and wine, he might get jealous, and jealousy is a bad thing.
I will not let Hans become jealous.
I am his best friend, and I will help him and keep him away from bad things.
If Hans came here, he might ask for flour, and I cannot give him that.'
